## What happened

A clear, short description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '…'
2. Click on '…'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.11.0]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17]
- LLM provider + model: [e.g. groq / llama-3.1-70b-versatile]
- Exam Oracle version / commit: [e.g. v0.1.0 or commit hash]

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste server logs (strip any API keys first!).

Add any other context.
